series_metadata.series_description: Records submitted as basis for enrolling/maintaining dependents in benefit programs that do not change over time. Includes birth certificates, consular report of birth abroad of a citizen of USA or certification of birth abroad, adoption court documents, international adoption papers, and disabled dependent approval paperwork.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 1 year following separation of employment then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 1 year following separation of employment then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
